overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and apartment buildings during golden hour, transitioning to swimming in the water with views of the city skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade starting from the dock area

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock structures extending into the water with blue metal railings
metal chain-link fence running along the water's edge
tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
black metal park benches facing the water
green ornate street lamps along the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a wooden dock area with blue railings, moving along a concrete waterfront promenade. Chain-link fencing separates the path from the water on the left, while palm trees and park benches line the right side. The lighting is warm golden hour with partly cloudy skies.

events.description: pedestrian in striped shirt passes close to the camera on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing by pedestrians and approaching the apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in purple shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: multi-story beige apartment building with balconies and red roof trim
blue outdoor umbrellas shading red tables and seating areas

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the waterfront with a large apartment building now dominating the right side. The camera passes two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Blue umbrellas and outdoor seating appear near the building entrance while the chain-link fence and water remain on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with tall palm trees

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall palm trees against the cloudy sky

agents.ego_description: walking past the apartment building while looking up at the palm trees and preparing to approach the water

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking ahead along the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the apartment building and tilts upward to capture the tall palm trees against the cloudy sky. The perspective shifts to show the height of the trees and building facade. A pedestrian in a yellow dress walks ahead on the path as the camera begins to turn back toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterway with city skyline view

events.description: character jumps into the water and begins swimming along the waterfront
transition from walking on pavement to swimming in water

agents.ego_description: swimming in the water along the waterfront with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: rippling water surface at eye level with reflections of the sky
black navigation buoy floating in the water with a concrete base
rocky breakwater wall along the shoreline with wire mesh
distant downtown skyscrapers visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character jumps into the water and begins swimming, transitioning to a water-level perspective. The view shows the rocky breakwater and chain-link fence along the shore, with navigation buoys floating nearby. The distant city skyline with tall skyscrapers becomes visible across the water as the camera moves forward through the rippling water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched waterfront promenade into the open sea, transitioning from a terrestrial walk to a water-level swim. It begins at a wooden dock with blue railings, moving along a concrete path where chain-link fencing separates the viewer from the water while palm trees and benches line the right. As the camera progresses, the scenery shifts to include a large apartment building with blue outdoor umbrellas and passing pedestrians under a warm golden hour sky. The perspective then tilts upward to capture the height of the palm trees and building facades before turning back toward the shore. Finally, the camera plunges into the ocean, shifting to a rippling water-level view that passes rocky breakwaters and navigation buoys to reveal the distant city skyline.
